meaning: n.旅客住宿处,收容所,济贫院
examples: A month after being admitted to hospital, swollen, breathless, and bleeding, with his leukemia as robust as ever, he went on hospice in the hospital and died.
The hospice aims to ease the sufferings of the dying.
Berle was diagnosed with colon cancer last year and had been under hospice care for the past few weeks.
But David Strudley, from the Acorns Children's Hospice said it own lottery generates more money.
The Acorns Children's Hospice in Worcester runs its own lottery and fears sales will be affected.
